description: An agent needs to send a weekly performance update to a seller client.

nodes.task_description: Identify the listing and the seller client's contact information.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the target listing and client.

nodes.task_description: Pull the listing's performance metrics for the past 7 days (online views, saves, showings scheduled).
Generate a standardized weekly report and email it to the seller.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates and sends the performance report.
